name: GEO Comparison Builder
description_en: Generates evidence-bound, same-criteria GEO brand-comparison content (vs pages, alternatives, selection pages, FAQ) with a decision-dimension model, source ledger, and scoring matrix, delivered as Word, PDF, HTML, and Markdown.
description_zh: 生成证据绑定、同口径的 GEO 品牌对比内容（vs 页、替代方案、选型页、FAQ），含决策维度模型、来源台账与评分矩阵，并交付 Word、PDF、HTML、Markdown 四格式。
long_en: Build fair, source-anchored brand comparisons for domestic AI platforms without disparaging competitors or making unverified claims.
long_zh: 为国内 AI 平台构建公平、来源锚定的品牌对比，不贬损竞品、不输出未经核验的结论。
sec_note_en: White-hat content optimization, not competitor smearing or detection evasion. Bundles a Python DOCX layout checker (check_docx_layout.py) for table overflow. Real-data modes (public web, user files, authorized connectors/API, AI-platform sampling) are declared per run; it explicitly must not read logged-in, paywalled, internal-system, or personal data, and unverifiable market-share/customer-count/price claims must be dropped or downgraded. Web access only when public-web or connector mode is enabled.
sec_note_zh: 白帽内容优化，非诋毁竞品或检测规避。捆绑 Python DOCX 版式检查脚本（check_docx_layout.py）检测表格溢出。每次运行声明真实数据模式（公开网页、用户文件、授权连接器/API、AI 平台采样）；明确不得读取登录后、付费、内部系统或个人数据，无法核验的市场份额/客户数/价格须删除或降级。仅在启用公开网页或连接器模式时联网。
